name: Gonta's Insect Meet And Greet!
description:
VOLUME WARNING!!! PLAY AUDIO AT YOUR OWN RISK!!!

This was an incredibly experimental bot because I was curious to see if I could write a mass bot!

Take a guess at what my favorite part in V3 was???(Also I decided to use the song that played during the scene because nobody can stop me)
